title: Install review and document search helpers
goal: Add difftastic and ripgrep-all/rga as helper views for PR review and document search without replacing GitHub/CI/runtime evidence.

acceptance.assertion: difftastic is available as an explicit helper command or alias and does not replace mandatory git diff evidence.
rga can search at least one PDF or Office-style test document, or missing adapters are documented.
Sensitive paths are excluded from broad document search defaults.
Review guidance states that helper search/diff output is orientation evidence, not final truth by itself.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
validation: Infra PR #107 GitHub CI validate passed.
scripts/utilities/heim-utilities-smoke.sh reported Backrest, Beszel, Stirling PDF, Paperless, Atuin, Difftastic, rga and LocalSend OK.
Restic util-base-v1 snapshot and single-file restore probe passed.
Paperless imported synthetic PDF document id 1 and indexed content containing UTIL-BASE-V1.
Stirling PDF converted the probe PDF to text and merged two copies into a 2-page PDF.
Docling 2.111.0 converted the probe PDF to Markdown and JSON with UTIL-BASE-V1 content.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in infra PR #107 and live-smoked on heim-pc; see runtime evidence for exact boundaries and remaining manual steps.

verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t006-2: rga 0.10.10 searched the Paperless original and archive PDFs and found UTIL-BASE-V1.
verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t006-3: Runtime/runbook document sensitive-path and authority boundaries.
verified_acceptance.util-base-v1-t006-4: Runtime evidence states helper outputs are orientation evidence, not final truth.
